{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {

    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,

    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 5

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output correctly identifies the logical consistency of the text, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs.",
    "R1.6": "The agent output improves a few problem paragraphs, but could have done more to polish the writing.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift in scope.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by stating that post-hoc coupling eliminates arbitrage revenue without sufficient context.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, but could have done more to provide clear provenance."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.6,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output correctly identifies the logical consistency of the text, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.6: The agent output improves a few problem paragraphs, but could have done more to polish the writing.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift in scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by stating that post-hoc coupling eliminates arbitrage revenue without sufficient context.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, but could have done more to provide clear provenance.
